summary: The diff shows a critical fix to the deduplication logic in frontend/src/lib/deduplication.ts that addresses the root cause of missing panels. The deduplicatePanelParts function was modified to always preserve all panels in the array, even when their text content is deduplicated, by removing a filter that was incorrectly removing entire panels. This change directly implements the requirements to restore the 18 missing panels and ensure deduplication only affects text content, not panel visibility.
